sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33562" key="e(leiomala/xh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑλειο-μᾰλάχη</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰχ]</pron>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑλειο-μολόχη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n33562.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marsh-mallow</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apul.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Herb.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope> </bibl> (<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">elaeo-</tr_> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
